Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.io.Advancing

Packages that use Advancing
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.

    Field
    Description
    static Advancing
    Advancing.Line
    Singleton instance representing a single line advance (typically ' ' in ASA).
    static Advancing
    Advancing.Page
    Singleton instance representing a page advance (typically '1' in ASA).

    Creates an Advancing instance based on an environment variable or mnemonic name.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ISequentialAPI.writeAfter(Advancing advancing)
    Writes data to the resource after advancing N PAGES/LINES.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing)
    Writes data to the file after advancing based on the provided parameter.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing, AbstractNField from)
    Writes data to the file after performing an operation on the provided record field and advancing according to the specified advancing behavior.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing, AbstractNField from, int reclen)
    Writes data to the file after performing operations on the provided record field and advancing based on the specified advancing behavior and record length.
